offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor payments/month, inefficient tracking causes late payments and supplier penalties. We provide consolidated payment status reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and reporting vendor payment statuses efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of payment statuses on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
